enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Anjali Anjali Pushpanjali expresses deep emotions of love and admiration, celebrating the beauty of a beloved.

In which movie does this song appear?

The song is from the movie Duet, which is known for its romantic themes and beautiful music.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of K.S.Chitra and S.P.Balasubramaniam, both renowned for their contributions to Tamil music.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Anjali Anjali Pushpanjali was composed by the legendary A.R.Rahman, who is celebrated for his innovative soundtracks.

When was this song released?

This beautiful duet was released on May 20, 1994, and has since become a beloved classic.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Duet, the song Anjali Anjali Pushpanjali serves as a heartfelt expression of love and admiration. The lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia, beautifully capturing the emotions of longing and affection. With its soothing melody and enchanting vocals, the song conveys the deep connection between lovers. It remains a timeless piece that resonates with anyone who has experienced the beauty of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Anjali Anjali Pushpanjali is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and nostalgia. With the enchanting lyrics of Vairamuthu and the magical composition by A.R.Rahman, this song remains a timeless classic. Experience the harmonious blend of K.S.Chitra and S.P.Balasubramaniam as they take you on a melodious journey through emotions.
stanzaMeanings: Anjali anjali pushpanjali
Flower, in your path, I offer a floral tribute; for your name, I offer a tribute; for your voice, I offer a musical tribute; for your beauty, I offer a poetic tribute.
Anjali anjali pushpanjali Anjali anjali pushpanjali
Flower, in your path, I offer a floral tribute; for your name, I offer a tribute; for your voice, I offer a musical tribute; for your beauty, I offer a poetic tribute.
Until love comes searching, both of them are in their own separate love, like a golden thread intertwined, my dear.
In the sea, when the rain falls, which drop of rain is like that? I have mixed in love like that, my beloved.
I have held the divine feet. Every day, I have sung a new song.
Anjali anjali, my dear beloved.
Flower, in your path, I offer a floral tribute; for your name, I offer a tribute; for your voice, I offer a musical tribute; for your beauty, I offer a poetic tribute.
Anjali anjali pushpanjali Anjali anjali pushpanjali
Flower, in your path, I offer a floral tribute; for your name, I offer a tribute; for your voice, I offer a musical tribute; for your beauty, I offer a poetic tribute.
The love of Seethai has now become a thread; the love of the garland has now entered the path of the ear.
I don't know what has happened to my heart; music has come and mixed; the path of music has slowly become Tamil.
Looking at the direction where music has come from, my heart has melted; looking at the direction where Tamil has come from, my life has blossomed.
Anjali anjali, this is my beloved.
Beloved, for your love, I offer a floral tribute; my friend, for your eyes, I offer a dance tribute; for your music, I offer a musical tribute; poet, for your Tamil, I offer a poetic tribute.
Anjali anjali pushpanjali Anjali anjali pushpanjali
Flower, in your path, I offer a floral tribute; for your name, I offer a tribute; for your voice, I offer a musical tribute; for your beauty, I offer a poetic tribute.
Oh beautiful one, there is no wonder like you; I have spoken the name of Anjali; it has blossomed like a jasmine flower.
If the month of Karthigai passes, there will be no heavy rain; my dear, if you are not there, there will be no poems.
Were you born with the moon? Did you grow up like a flower in the garden?
Anjali anjali, my dear beloved.
Flower, in your path, I offer a floral tribute; for your name, I offer a tribute; for your voice, I offer a musical tribute; for your beauty, I offer a poetic tribute.
Anjali anjali pushpanjali Anjali anjali pushpanjali
Flower, in your path, I offer a floral tribute; for your name, I offer a tribute; for your voice, I offer a musical tribute; for your beauty, I offer a poetic tribute.
